title: Phase 1: DuckDB Integration & zarrs_ffi Wrapper
description:
## Goal
Implement ~150 LOC of core DuckDB integration and zarrs_ffi wrapper for the duckdb-zarr extension.

## Tasks
1. Table function registration (read_zarr)
2. Schema inference from zarrs_ffi metadata APIs
3. DataChunk conversion to DuckDB vectors
4. Predicate pushdown support
5. Projection pushdown (only read requested columns)

## Dependencies
- zarrs_ffi: Zarr reading (chunk retrieval, decompression, Zarr v2/v3, metadata APIs)
- Arrow C++: Already a DuckDB dependency
- DuckDB yyjson: Already in DuckDB tree

## Key APIs to use
- zarrsOpenArrayRW() - Open array handle
- zarrsArrayGetDimensionality() - Get dimensionality
- zarrsArrayGetShape() - Get array shape
- zarrsArrayGetDataType() - Get data type
- zarrsArrayGetChunkGridShape() - Get chunk grid shape

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Table function read_zarr(path, array) works
- [ ] Schema is inferred from Zarr metadata
- [ ] Data is returned as DuckDB vectors
- [ ] Build passes on CI
